subcodes.first_line: O distinguished personage! The people are frail and susceptible, and the shrewd soul must guide them through fear and hope [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شخص شخیص خلق ضعیفند و محیل عاجزند و ماگر باید ایشانرا بخوف و رجا نگاه داشت
subcodes.subjects: @reward and punishment, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @justice and mercy, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
